text.title: devops-lb-health-checks Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for devops-lb-health-checks as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Health endpoint that always returns 200 regardless of dependency state.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The load balancer routes traffic to instances that will fail every real request. The outage is hidden until users report errors.

failure-mode.description: Liveness probe that checks the database connection.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A database outage will cause every pod to fail liveness and restart in a loop, converting a partial outage into a full application restart storm. Liveness must only verify the process is not deadlocked.
